frame_analyses.description: Tutorial title slide for Stanford FLS suturing tutorial
Demonstration of proper needle loading technique outside trainer
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good educational demonstration of grasping suture at stiffest part within 1cm of needle

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration showing needle stabilization at point 2 during loading
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper technique demonstration for needle control

frame_analyses.description: Educational frame showing challenge of loading needle in mid-air
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Highlighting difficulty of intracorporeal needle loading

frame_analyses.description: Tutorial slide showing FLS Task 5 specifications - 15cm suture, 10 minute max time, 112 second target
Educational demonstration of right hand turning needle clockwise to create rainbow configuration
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Excellent technique demonstration for first throw setup

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration showing 2 wraps clockwise creating under-over configuration for surgeon's knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Perfect demonstration of surgeon's knot double throw technique

frame_analyses.description: Educational frame highlighting smiley face direction of needle for proper throw orientation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Excellent visual cue for proper needle orientation

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration of pulling suture ends in opposite directions to cinch down the knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good demonstration of proper knot tightening technique

frame_analyses.description: Educational demonstration showing wrapping technique with small circles near instrument tips
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Excellent demonstration of controlled wrapping technique for subsequent throws
